title: orthandra cirrhosa
intro: Orthandra cirrhosa, also known as the African bushman's tea or orthosiphon, is a plant native to South Africa, characterized by its dark green leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of caffeic acid and orthosiphon. The health benefits of Orthandra cirrhosa include its ability to help manage kidney stones, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Orthandra cirrhosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
